biography:
Founder, ALTRD
.
Teaching you AI while I build a company in AI

items.caption_text:
A tap → triggers NFC
NFC → runs an iPhone shortcut
Shortcut → calls ChatGPT
ChatGPT → generates a fresh story
Voice → plays it instantly

items.caption_text:
Had the most unexpected, fun day with Team Lucknow Super Giants @lucknowsupergiants 

I taught AI to Mohammed Shami, Mayank Yadav and Mitchell Marsh

Shami built a mango app
– tells you which mango, from which region, and how to use it in a recipe

Mitch built a Mario-style game
– but with a kangaroo teaching Hindi 

Mayank built an AI stylist 
– you describe your vibe, it tells you what to wear

Had so much fun building this with them.

Grateful to OpenAI and @kashondelivery for making this possible.

If you could build anything just by describing it… what would you create with #codex?

items.caption_text:
I generally don’t take breaks and I’ve honestly never been fully away from work. Even after getting married a few months ago, I didn’t feel the need to take a trip immediately because I felt like I already had everything I wanted from the wedding. 

But we had decided that once the financial year ends, we’ll take the honeymoon and 

the last five days were a perfect mix of everything, activities, personal moments, friendship, meeting new people, and also relaxing. 

Some of the most beautiful sunsets, long drives, and just slowing down for a bit. 

And now we’re in SF, super excited to get back to work mode and bring you guys all the cool AI things and updates. 

Stay tuned 💛💛

items.caption_text:
Stop using Claude the way everyone else is and start leveraging it for actual data-driven growth. 

By using a connector like Windsor, you can integrate Claude directly with your Instagram profile to transform your raw data into a high-level AI workflow.

Once connected, Claude analyzes your entire account history from top-performing content to specific engagement patterns and trends. Instead of guessing why your reach fluctuated, you can identify exactly when and why growth spiked or dropped.

This is the difference between generic AI usage and strategic automation.

The real power lies in the application. You can prompt Claude to build a custom 30-day content plan based entirely on your historical patterns. These aren’t generic ideas; they are hyper-personalized strategies built on your past performance, audience behavior, and unique content style.

Check out Claude connectors to start optimizing your Instagram strategy with generative AI.

items.caption_text:
Comment AI and I’ll send you the link.

Most organizations are stuck in the early stages of AI adoption. 

Having implemented AI solutions for over 50 enterprises globally, I have identified five distinct levels of AI maturity that define how a business scales its productivity and automation.

Level 1: Basic Adoption
Teams use ChatGPT or Claude for isolated tasks like writing emails. This is where most businesses currently reside.

Level 2: The Bot Stage
Departments build custom GPTs or Claude Projects for specific, repetitive tasks.

Level 3: Vibe Coding and Generative Design
Marketing teams generate AI creatives while other departments use vibe coding to build functional dashboards and interfaces.

Level 4: Connected AI Workflows
Organizations move beyond silos. They begin connecting different applications to build cohesive AI workflows that streamline data across the company.

Level 5: The Agent Stage
The peak of AI integration. Businesses build autonomous systems and AI agents that run entire processes with minimal intervention.

If you are unsure where your organization stands in this evolution, we can help you evaluate your current AI strategy and technical stack.

items.caption_text:
Comment CLAUDE and I’ll send you the link.

​If you feel left behind as Claude dominates the conversation, you need to move beyond using AI as a basic chatbot. Most users only use generative AI for emails, but becoming a top 1% user requires mastering advanced AI workflows.

​Use these three resources to gain an edge:
• ​Anthropic’s Free Course: Learn to use AI tools directly from the creators.
• ​Official Skills Library: Professional AI workflows that teach Claude to execute tasks exactly like you.
• ​Awesome Claude Code Subagents: A community repo that acts like adding specialized apps to your AI setup.

​Stop treating AI like a chatbot and start using it as a productivity engine.

items.caption_text:
Comment INVIDEO and I’ll send you the link to this agent.

This AI agent transforms your script and treatment into a professional video without any prompt engineering. 

Maintaining visual consistency in AI workflows is a major challenge for filmmakers and directors, but this tool automates the entire production pipeline.

To start, go to ai.invideo.io and select Agent Mode. 

Upload your script and treatment; the agent will analyze your characters and world, pick the right generative AI models, and write the prompts for you.

Once approved, it animates fifteen frames into a single, cohesive video.

This is a significant breakthrough for productivity with AI in advertising and film.

items.caption_text:
A lot of you are new here, so let me reintroduce myself. 
Hi, I’m Gayatri. I run an AI company called ALTRD.

I spent two years in Spain - partly because I was building an AI product that won an award, and partly because I think Spanish is just really sexy.

At ALTRD we help enterprises adopt AI. We go in, look at their manual processes, train their teams, and build custom agents for them.

I got into AI before it became cool. so here we are.

You’ll either find me prototyping something with Claude Code or at a music festival outside India. genuinely no in between.

And somewhere in all of this chaos - I met my person while traveling and married him a couple months ago.

And that brings me here.

If you wanna get started with your AI journey, follow along

items.caption_text:
Most large enterprises face the same bottleneck: they are sitting on massive amounts of data but lack the workflows to utilize it effectively. 

We see this gap constantly.

We recently solved this for a major conglomerate in Sri Lanka. 

Their procurement team was receiving multiple agency proposals every week, and each time, they started from scratch. 

They were manually researching vendors and trying to recall past collaborations from memory. It was a highly inefficient manual process.

We transformed this using AI automation. Now, the moment a proposal arrives in an inbox, the AI workflow takes over. 

The reality is that a human cannot process, synthesize, and analyze that volume of data manually. 

AI excels at this exact task. To implement AI workflows in your own business, you do not need to start with something complex.

items.caption_text:
5 things I’ve completely stopped doing because AI does it better than me 👀

This is what an AI-first workflow actually looks like:

• Running your business with agents (custom built) 

• Creating decks in minutes @genspark_ai / @claudeai 

• Never typing again @wisprflow 

• Automating finance decisions (built an app with @chatgpt codex) 

• Staying updated without scrolling (setup on @google)

Most people are still using AI like a tool.
The real shift is when AI becomes your system.

If you’re still doing things manually, you’re already behind.

Save this and start with just ONE.

items.caption_text:
Claude doesn’t generate images 

Most people think it is a limitation, but it is actually a choice.

Because image generation also opens the door to deepfakes, misuse, and misinformation.

Anthropic chose to prioritise safety over hype.

So before reacting to headlines of Anthropic’s source code leak, it is worth pausing and thinking- 

It’s the same company that let go of govt contracts over ‘security’ 

They’re letting go of features over ‘security’

What do you think about this? 

#claude #dataleak #ai

items.caption_text:
What started as a small shift ended up changing how I work completely.

I began using AI to remove friction from how I think and communicate.

Now, instead of typing everything, I use Wispr Flow. It basically lets me speak naturally and converts that into clean, structured text that my team can read, search, and act on.

It also fixes small errors, organizes thoughts into clear points, and makes sure nothing gets lost in translation.

The result is simple. Less back and forth, better clarity, and much faster execution across the team.

That is the real shift for me.

If you want to try it, you can use the code GAYATRIFLOWS for one month of free access to @wisprflow 

Comment link and I will send it to you. 

#ai #productivity #founders

items.caption_text:
I spent a day inside Intuit’s Bangalore office and asked engineers one question: 

What actually changes in 2026 with AI?

The answer was fascinating.

AI is turning engineers into builders. Less repetitive code. Less documentation. More thinking. More ownership.

What stood out at Intuit? They’re not chasing every shiny tool — they’re asking sharper questions and deeply owning the full dev lifecycle.

The part most people miss? Code fluency still matters.
AI can assist. But clarity of thinking? That’s all you.

In 2026, you’re not just coding — you’re orchestrating. 

#AI #Intuit #Bangalore #Engineers

items.caption_text:
March feels hotter than ever, and like everyone else I was just relying on the AC.

But then I thought, we use AI for work and productivity…
why not for everyday life

Like figuring out waste, compost, or even how to keep your home cooler

That is when I found ELI by House of Hiranandani
A simple WhatsApp chatbot that helps you make smarter daily choices

And honestly, it makes life a lot easier

If you want to try it, comment “WhatsApp” and I will send you the link

#Sustainability #AI #WhatsApp

items.caption_text:
Analyse your meta ads data with AI now

Connecting with Meta Ads Manager changes this. Beyond just pulling your data, Manus analyzes ad performance, delivers insights, and even creates meaningful output formats like slides, infographics, dashboards, websites and more. 

Copy one into Manus and adjust it to fit your business. Try it now!

For a high-level summary: “Create a dashboard with a summary of my ad performance for the last 7 days”

For campaign comparison: “Create a slide deck that compares the ROAS and CPC for my ‘Summer Sale’ and ‘Winter Promo’ campaigns.”

For audience insights: “Which age demographic has the highest click-through rate across all my active campaigns?”

For creative analysis: “Which of my ad images has the best conversion rate this month?, create a new batch of 30 ad images based on the insights”

For optimization: “Identify my top 3 recommendations for my ad account.”

items.caption_text:
Open any Reddit thread, for example on r/startups or r/entrepreneur.

Add .json at the end of the URL.

Suddenly the entire thread becomes structured data.
Every comment, reply, upvote, and metadata.

Now upload that file into any LLM, whether it’s ChatGPT or Claude, and ask it to analyze the discussion.

Personally, I’ve stopped typing prompts almost entirely.
I just speak to AI using Wispr Flow.

Much faster than typing.

Try it yourself.

Free 1 month access to Flow: GAYATRIFLOWS

items.caption_text:
🚨Hiring at ALTRD🚨

We’re expanding our team across multiple roles, AI engineers, operations, HR, accountant, and video editors for my content.

A few important things before you apply:
• All roles are full-time
• All roles are in-office in Bangalore
• We move fast and work with high energy, so startup comfort is important

What matters to us most is not your degree or what your CV says.

Your work speaks louder. Share videos, links to projects, portfolios, or a short cover note explaining what you’ve built or why you’re a fit.

We’re happy to pay at par or above market for the right people. The bar is simply very high.

If you’re sharp, curious, and excited about building with AI, fill the application form!

items.caption_text:
Natural language email automation ✨🚀

One thing to note :this works with Google Workspace accounts, not personal Gmail.

This AI scans your entire inbox, unsubscribes you from useless emails, replies to the obvious ones, and leaves only the important stuff for you

And the crazy part? it all happens inside Gmail itself.
you just open Gmail, click this icon, and type something like:

“unsubscribe me from promotional emails, reply to simple emails automatically, and keep only the important ones.”

Studio Flow builds the entire automation for you

You can even ask it to send you a morning summary of your inbox and it’ll do it automatically, every single day.
this is Google’s Studio Flow

Go try it and follow for more workflows like this 🔁

items.caption_text:
AI is changing how businesses handle money.

I attended FTX26 by @razorpay and saw some incredible new features.

​They launched Agentic Payments where AI can manage the entire shopping and payment process for you.

They also introduced Agent Studio which uses AI to call clients and recover pending payments automatically.

All of this combined truly make Razorpay India’s first AI-native fintech stack

This means everything from setting up your account to managing daily operations is powered by AI. 

It makes running a business much easier for founders everywhere.

#fintech #ai #agents
